selections.name: Long Term Market
selections.reason: Boasts a massive 117 class rating and 113 speed figure. Top connections with Chad Brown and Flavien Prat. Outside draw is ideal for the 1-mile configuration.

selections.name: Phantom Blue
selections.reason: Strong 115 class rating and 109 speed figure. Dylan Davis takes the mount. Showed excellent early speed in previous starts.

selections.name: Dr Glick
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee making a surface switch. Has back class and solid 106 speed figure. Inside draw requires a clean break.

selections.name: Jadorlinija
selections.reason: Clement trainee with Jaime Rodriguez. Posted a 106 speed figure and has room to improve second time out.

danger_horse.name: Full Of Tact
danger_horse.reason: Experienced runner with 6 starts. Class rating of 106 makes her a threat if the top choices falter.

selections.name: Fire Marshal
selections.reason: First-time starter for Michael Maker with Flavien Prat aboard. Strong turf pedigree and sharp recent workouts.

selections.name: Arctic Wolf
selections.reason: Outside draw is beneficial for a 2YO first-timer. Santana Jr. rides for Antonacci. Solid works leading up to debut.

selections.name: River Of Deceit
selections.reason: Tom Morley trainee with Junior Alvarado. Hard Spun progeny usually take well to the turf.

selections.name: Zodiac Warrior
selections.reason: Jackie's Warrior colt with Kendrick Carmouche. Has the pedigree to show early tactical speed.

danger_horse.name: Medieval
danger_horse.reason: Only horse in the field with race experience. Posted an 88 speed figure on debut and will benefit from the run.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #2, Exacta Box 2-9, Trifecta 2,9 / 2,4,6,9 / ALL

selections.name: Concurrently
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with a 112 class rating. Drops in class and gets Flavien Prat. Standout on figures.

selections.name: Hand Over Heart
selections.reason: Impressive debut winner with a 120 class rating. Outside draw allows Dylan Davis to secure a clean stalking trip.

selections.name: Krissys Star
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 102 class rating. Jaime Rodriguez takes the mount. Tactical speed to sit just off the pace.

selections.name: Pinky Brier
selections.reason: Classy filly with a 110 class rating. Santana Jr. rides. Can close well if the pace gets hot.

danger_horse.name: People Watching
danger_horse.reason: Carmouche rides for Proctor. 106 class rating and solid recent form make her a legitimate exotic threat.

selections.name: Wildest Dreams
selections.reason: First-time starter for Jeremiah Englehart with Flavien Prat. Excellent workout tab suggests she is ready to fire.

selections.name: Legacy Lady
selections.reason: Jorge Delgado trainee with Edgard Zayas. Solid works at Monmouth indicate readiness.

selections.name: Annotate
selections.reason: Asmussen first-timer with Santana Jr. Honest Mischief progeny should have plenty of early zip.

selections.name: Tiara
selections.reason: Danny Gargan trainee with Carmouche. Inside draw is tricky but has the pedigree to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Miss Money Pants
danger_horse.reason: Has race experience with an 86 speed figure and 117 class rating. Will improve second time out.

selections.name: Mutaawid
selections.reason: Brad Cox and Flavien Prat team up. 116 speed figure and proven at marathon distances. Tactical speed is a major asset here.

selections.name: Emergence
selections.reason: Matches the top choice with a 116 speed figure. Junior Alvarado rides. Consistent late runner who will appreciate the distance.

selections.name: Mayor Of Midnight
selections.reason: Another with a 116 speed figure. Manny Franco rides for Riley Mott. Excellent turf pedigree and form.

selections.name: Harrow
selections.reason: Highest raw speed figure in the field (120). Dylan Davis rides. Inside draw saves ground for the long marathon trip.

danger_horse.name: Dreamlike
danger_horse.reason: Classy runner with a 116 class rating. Carmouche rides. Dangerous if he gets a clean trip from the outside.

selections.name: Luckbeourlady
selections.reason: First-time starter for Miguel Clement with Manny Franco. Outside draw is perfect for a 6-furlong dirt sprint debut.

selections.name: Kaz Farm Girl
selections.reason: Experienced runner with a 101 class rating. Dylan Davis rides. Consistent figures make her a strong contender.

selections.name: Coco D'oro
selections.reason: First-timer for Amelia Green with Jaime Rodriguez. Honest Mischief progeny with solid works.

selections.name: Camille's Legacy
selections.reason: Posted a 97 speed figure in her lone start. Katie Davis rides. Will improve significantly with experience.

danger_horse.name: Peggie Castle
danger_horse.reason: Has a 92 speed figure and 91 class rating. Ruben Silvera rides. Can hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Lady Rose
selections.reason: Massive 117 class rating and 104 speed figure. Jose Lezcano rides for Linda Rice. Standout on class and figures.

selections.name: Sparkling Mama
selections.reason: Flavien Prat rides. 105 class rating and consistent form. Inside draw is the only slight concern.

selections.name: Gracie's Delight
selections.reason: Santana Jr. rides for Linda Rice. 108 class rating and 99 speed figure. Strong late kick.

selections.name: Donna Romano
selections.reason: Manny Franco rides for Brad Cox. 103 class rating. Outside draw allows for a clean stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Dee's On Dow
danger_horse.reason: Highest raw speed figure in the field (105). Edgard Zayas rides. Dangerous if she gets loose on the lead.

selections.name: Luckforyou
selections.reason: Consistent turf runner with a 101 speed figure. Outside draw keeps her out of trouble. Strong late closing kick.

selections.name: Roagna
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field (112). Edgard Zayas rides. Drops in class and should be very competitive here.

selections.name: Bossy Dish
selections.reason: Solid 102 speed figure and 98 class rating. Reylu Gutierrez rides. Tactical speed to sit mid-pack.

selections.name: Leslie's Star
selections.reason: Jose Lezcano rides for Linda Rice. 111 speed figure and 101 class rating. Major threat on her best day.

danger_horse.name: Amelia's Echo
danger_horse.reason: Manny Franco rides. 102 speed figure and 99 class rating. Wide draw is tough but has the talent to overcome it.
